name: engineering
description: Engineering discipline skills — code review, security review, TDD, debugging, spec-driven development, incremental implementation, planning, verification, worktree-based isolation, multi-agent convergence loops, and the HTML Plan Ecosystem (live plans-server + Plan Inbox). Battle-tested patterns for shipping reliable software.

commands.name: plan
commands.description: HTML Plan Ecosystem: new | open | list | serve | reconcile.

config.description: Repo-relative directory holding plan artifacts and the Plan Inbox.
Require a per-session token on every plans-server request (recommended).
